title: Two PhD Positions in AI for Health Data within the AI:HealthData Lab
summary: Two PhD stipends under AI:X. One focuses on AI-driven data management and knowledge graphs over health records; the other on clinically grounded generative-AI-supported patient summaries for general practice.
notes: More health data / clinical NLP than imaging
Danish helpful/required for one of the two tracks
